decisions.cat1_intent_fidelity: 3 decisions: A-accepted (add Type 3/4 templates to REFERENCE.md), B-accepted (clarify TDMS language to 'TDMS-ready output'), C-accepted (define functional validation as concrete checklist in Phase 5)
decisions.cat2_workflow_sequencing: 5 decisions: A-accepted (add sub-step tracking to Phase 4 state persistence), B-accepted (grep-based evidence checklist for Phase 6 self-audit), C-accepted (move name validation to Phase 1), D-rejected (Phase 3 decision record already serves as synthesis), E-accepted (add Done when to Phase 7)
decisions.cat3_input_output_quality: 4 decisions: A-accepted (add input constraints to Warm-Up/Input section), B-accepted (add complete output manifest table), C-accepted (document template variables in REFERENCE.md), D-rejected (warm-up is pre-discovery; Phase 3 is right place for artifact preview)
decisions.cat4_decision_points: 4 decisions: A-accepted (add cross-batch revision mechanism), B-accepted (promote Batch 5 from MAY to SHOULD), C-accepted (add post-discovery 'anything else?' prompt), D-rejected (outbound inference pattern is sufficient)
decisions.cat5_integration_surface: 4 decisions: A-accepted (add session-end interaction guidance), B-accepted (strengthen skill-audit handoff to Phase 5 gate), C-accepted (promote audit-comprehensive update to SHOULD), D-rejected (downstream impacts are generic)
decisions.cat6_guard_rails: 4 decisions: A-accepted (add Phase 4 error recovery guidance), B-rejected (two examples sufficient for contradiction detection), C-accepted (add inline quality checks during Phase 4 generation), D-accepted (add abort option to Phase 3 approval gate)
decisions.cat7_prompt_engineering: 5 decisions: A-accepted (extract Guard Rails, Anti-Patterns, Integration to REFERENCE.md), B-rejected (extraction handles this), C-accepted (repeat key critical rules at point-of-use), D-accepted (add MUST/SHOULD/MAY to Phase 4 sub-steps), E-rejected (ASCII flow is more scannable)
decisions.cat8_scope_boundaries: 3 decisions: A-accepted (add GSD routing guidance row), B-accepted (clarify Type 3 boundary with skill-creator), C-rejected (Phase 1 already scans for overlap)
decisions.cat9_institutional_memory: 4 decisions: A-accepted (add project-specific TDMS pipeline anchor), B-rejected (surfacing sufficient; adaptive defaults add complexity), C-accepted (add rationale capture to discovery rules), D-accepted (promote CLAUDE.md Section 5 to Critical Rules for generated scripts)
decisions.cat10_user_experience: 4 decisions: A-accepted (add progress indicators to Phase 4 sub-steps), B-rejected (approve with changes covers partial approval), C-rejected (per-phase estimates false precision), D-rejected (SKILL_STANDARDS.md covers visual structure)
decisions.cat11_convergence_loop: 3 decisions: A-accepted as MUST (user override — convergence loops on discovery phases are core T25 use case), B-accepted (add T20 tally to Phase 6 self-audit), C-accepted (add user gate before convergence declaration in Phase 2)
decisions.od_operational_deps: 1 decision: OD-1-accepted (add full paths to Phase 4.5 supporting file references)

cross_cutting_principles: USER-REQ-1: skill-audit validation should be a Phase 5 gate, not just a Phase 7 suggestion
USER-REQ-2: SKILL_STANDARDS.md needs a standardized self-audit section — most/all skills should have skill-audit-style validation at completion, canonical pattern derived from skill-audit Phase 5
USER-REQ-3: Create-audit should add generated audit to audit-comprehensive's skill list as part of Phase 4 (Build), not just suggest in Phase 7
USER-REQ-4: Discovery phases everywhere should use convergence loops as MUST, not SHOULD — primary reason convergence loops exist
files_modified: .claude/skills/create-audit/REFERENCE.md (added Type 3/4 templates, template variables, guard rails, output manifest)
.claude/skills/skill-creator/SKILL.md (SC-1: cross-batch revision, SC-2: post-discovery prompt, SC-3: evidence self-check)
skill_creator_gap_details: SC-3: evidence-based self-check before skill-audit — FIXED
learnings: T25 convergence loop integration is the most common gap across skills — discovery phases without CL are the default failure mode
Consistent 7/10 pattern suggests competent-but-not-polished skills — structure is covered but behavioral depth is missing
Cross-skill gaps compound — SKILL_STANDARDS.md is the right place to codify universal patterns like self-audit at completion
